projects.name: 01-company-database
projects.description: Corporate employee supervision and project mapping schema. Highlights double-nested NOT EXISTS relational division.

projects.description: Accounts receivable, salesman commissions, and catalog margins. Details dynamic column expansions and sell price check bounds.

projects.name: 03-supplier-inventory
projects.description: Supplier distributions resolved using dynamic average cost evaluations and nested comparative subqueries.

projects.name: 04-student-athletics
projects.description: Athlete play schedules using composite event assignments and grouping thresholds.

projects.name: 05-inbuilt-functions
projects.description: Department HR analytics, co-hiring joins, and case/date modifications.

projects.name: 01-hotel-management
projects.description: Schema-less hotel directory with embedded addresses and inspection histories.

projects.name: nhl-league
projects.description: NHL sports database modeling recursive home/guest matches and weak player injury logs.

projects.name: university-registrar
projects.description: University registrar mapping structural courses, weak sections, and ternary grade report cards.

projects.name: company-dbms
projects.description: Corporate supervision recursive loops, many-to-many hours, and dependent cascades.
